images.alt: The visual is a bold, stylized graphic design portrait inspired by the aesthetics of the "Born This Way" music video. I am centered within a large, inverted pink triangle outline that glows with a neon intensity against a stark, deep black background. Inside the triangle, I am looking fierce and defiant, facing the camera head-on. I am wearing an exaggerated avant-garde outfit—structured sharp shoulders, metallic spikes, and latex textures that reflect the pink light. My makeup is dramatic with heavy contouring and perhaps a skeletal motif nodding to the video. The lighting is high-contrast and theatrical, casting long, sharp shadows. The vibe is empowering, monstrous, and unapologetically proud.

空き時間で超解像の調整をしています。

欧米美人化で、鼻の下の人中以外に、眉毛、目元、口元と勝手に変えられていたのが、なんとか無効化できそうな感じです。

特に写真を撮った時に現れる、表情の読み取れない女の子の雰囲気は日本特有なのでしょうか。不思議ちゃんなのか、親が厳しいのか、写真を撮る時にあまり笑ってはいけないと言われたのか、なんなのでしょうね。なぜかほっておけなくなります。今日のおはようお姉さんにもそれっぽい表情なのですけど。モデルさんの表情でもないようなのですけど、ただの根暗ちゃんなのかな。

#シーン
戦争で爆撃され、焼け落ちたキリスト教会の内部
焦げた瓦礫、焦げた壁
崩壊した大聖堂の建築。瓦礫に覆われた床に散らばる、黒焦げになった木製の梁（はり）
崩落した屋根からはドラマチックな青空が覗いている
ひび割れ、砕けたステンドグラスの窓から、舞い上がる埃の中に光が差し込んでいる

空気中に漂う煙と灰
忘れがたいほどに美しい、映画のようなライティング、フォトリアル（写実的）、極めて詳細、8k解像度

images.alt:
An expressive painterly artwork depicts a ballerina captured mid-performance against a textured, pale gray background. She balances en pointe on one foot, her body arched gracefully as the other leg extends upward in a dramatic pose. Her dark dress appears to explode into a swirling cloud of crimson, scarlet, and deep burgundy brushstrokes that radiate outward like petals, embers, or splashes of liquid paint. Her long dark hair streams behind her, merging with the same vibrant eruption of color. Thick palette-knife textures and visible brush marks cover the entire image, creating a sense of movement and emotional intensity. Bright red accents concentrate around the dancer’s skirt, shoes, and flowing hair, while softer creams, grays, and whites provide contrast in the background. Paint splatters scatter across the canvas, reinforcing the sensation that the dancer is transforming into pure motion and energy. The composition feels both elegant and explosive, blending classical ballet with abstract expressionist techniques.
Keywords:
ballerina, dance, expressionism, painterly, crimson, movement, abstract, performance, texture, elegance, motion, contemporary
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A dark fantasy portrait depicts a rune-smith seated low to the ground inside a cluttered forge filled with hanging talismans, rusted metal fragments, and chains. The figure stares directly toward the viewer with an intense, almost predatory expression. Their face is painted pale with dark markings around the eyes, creating a striking contrast against the warm orange glow of nearby firelight. Atop their head rises an elaborate crown constructed from gears, circuit boards, twisted metal, wires, and scraps of machinery, blending ancient ritual symbolism with industrial debris. Small sparks drift upward from the crown as though it is actively forging magic.
Heavy chains drape across the figure’s chest and shoulders, while ragged clothing in faded reds and grays hangs loosely around them. Tattoos and painted runic symbols cover exposed skin. Between their hands rests a glowing rune-carved block illuminated by fiery orange light, suggesting an act of enchantment or craftsmanship. The floor is scattered with ash, metal fragments, tools, and smoldering debris.
In the background, a furnace burns brightly, casting warm highlights across the workshop. Hanging charms, engraved metal plates, and weathered relics sway from overhead rods, framing the scene and reinforcing the atmosphere of a mystical junkyard forge where technology and ancient sorcery have merged into a single craft.

Keywords:
rune-smith, dark fantasy, forge, runes, chains, machinery, embers, industrial magic, character portrait, ritual workshop, sparks, scavenger

AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A young woman walks confidently through a narrow stone-paved alley lined with weathered whitewashed buildings. Overhead, dense clusters of brilliant pink bougainvillea flowers spill across the lane, creating a vivid floral canopy that filters the bright midday sunlight. Fallen petals in shades of pink, coral, and orange blanket both sides of the walkway, forming colorful ribbons that guide the eye toward the distance. The woman wears round sunglasses, a light crocheted halter-style top, and a flowing white wrap skirt patterned with warm red-orange floral accents. The skirt billows dramatically around her as she moves, adding a sense of motion and elegance. Soft shadows from the flowers dance across the stone pavement and building walls. Open shutters and doorways reveal hints of the surrounding architecture, while the bright Mediterranean atmosphere creates a feeling of warmth, leisure, and summer adventure. The composition centers the figure beneath the floral tunnel, emphasizing both the vibrant blossoms and the graceful movement of her clothing.
Keywords:
bougainvillea, alleyway, summer, floral canopy, travel, sunglasses, flowing skirt, white architecture, Mediterranean, petals, fashion, sunlight

On Mondays and Sundays, a story will be told by The KittenBot.

The KittenBot checks the last reply of this post in order to know in which city the story should take place.


In case you want to vote for a city:

+ Please subscribe to this account (i.e. follow), and

+ Then, on the Monday of your choice (or the Sunday of your choice), before 13:00 (UTC), Please reply to this post: your reply should contain the name of the city you chose.


Example:
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "Paris,France".

Other examples:
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "Paris,FR".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,GB".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,UK".

@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,CA".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,US".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,Kentucky,US".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "Milan,IT".


As shown in the example, the reply should mention me.

Please note that they are no space character before the colon character.
The whole reply should be identical as the example: only the text between the first double quote and the second double quote can be changed.


Please note that your reply must be sent:
+ after that The RandomBot chose a city.
+ before that The KittenBot starts verifying the chosen city.

The KittenBot always considers that the last reply embeds the name of the chosen city.

Indeed:

+ At 13:00 (UTC), The KittenBot checks the last post of this thread in order to know the city that was chosen. The KittenBot then tells a story that could happen in this city.

+ At 13:05 (UTC), The RandomBot randomly chooses another city. This city will be taken into account during the next run of The KittenBot if no reply is posted by anyone else.



In case you are happy with the story written by the bot, please do not hesitate to:

+ like this post, and

+ repost this post, and
